title: Use Spacing to Explain Relationships
summary: Build and verify design spacing alignment in survey grouping and alignment consistency audit through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain design spacing alignment from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply design spacing alignment without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 03 · Read the survey grouping and alignment consistency audit case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 3: Which claim preserves design spacing alignment when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: survey grouping and alignment consistency audit.
steps.why: Use Spacing to Explain Relationships makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 3 in survey grouping and alignment consistency audit.

content.text: Proximity signals relationship. A small deliberate spacing scale, shared alignment edges, logical properties, and consistent group rhythm reduce visual parsing work. Whitespace is functional separation, not unused capacity. Dense or arbitrary gaps can make labels, help, errors, fields, and actions appear connected to the wrong content. Apply it to survey grouping and alignment consistency audit.
